arts.ttl: Exclusive Interview: Utrecht winger Adrian Blake | Leaving Watford, ‘amazing’ atmospheres & life in the Netherlands
arts.sum: Football-Oranje’s Michael Statham spoke with Utrecht’s 19-year-old winger Adrian Blake. Enjoy an interview discussing his move away from Watford at a young age to move to the Netherlands, where he is now breaking through with an Utrecht side sitting fourth in the Dutch Eredivisie.
